summary: The batch implemented the planned interface-first contract skeleton. No canonical graph or package spec changes are requested.
deferred_items: Define first source provider fixtures before query runtime.
Define renderer adapter fixtures for table, kanban, calendar and gantt before UI runtime.
Add access/audit/source-validation integration tests before inline edit or drag/drop actions.
Define saved view persistence and privacy model before storage runtime.
Add ordinary-hosting query budget and cache policy before heavy aggregations.
